center.name: 錫爾赫特
center.summary: 錫爾赫特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括白眉鸭、黑背燕尾，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in much of Europe and across the Palearctic, but is strictly migratory, with the entire population moving to Africa, India (in particular Santragachi), Bangladesh (in the natural reservoirs of Sylhet district) and Australasia during the winter of the Northern hemisphere, where large flocks can occur

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is also found in the Sylhet and Chittagong regions of Bangladesh, where it is uncommon
